headline: Richelieu Hardware Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Richelieu Hardware (TSE:RCH) reported higher first-quarter sales and earnings while navigating foreign exchange headwinds and a softer performance in its Canadian hardware retail channel, according to executives on the company’s earnings call for the quarter ended Feb. 28, 2026.
